channel.title: Python3 on TechBits
channel.description: Recent content in Python3 on TechBits

item.title: Opening & Reading Files in Python
item.description: Learn how to open and read from files in Python3. Test yourself with a challenge at the end

item.title: Python File Handling
item.description: This series of articles covers the various functions and methods used to handle files in Python at a basic level.

item.title: Python Functions
item.description: Introduction #In this post, we will be covering the basics of Python functions: What are they ?, How do we use them ?
